## Description of Changes
Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation/context for them.

## Related Issue
Links to any related issues (e.g., `Closes #123`, `Fixes #456`, or `Ref #789`).

## Verification Steps
Describe the steps you took to verify your changes. Please include the specific command(s) used.

Example:
```bash
pytest tests/test_specific_feature.py
```

## Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please check all that apply:
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated to cover these changes.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated to reflect the changes.
- [ ] The protocol specification remains unchanged, OR an RFC has been submitted and merged under `spec/rfcs/`.
- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines (PEP 8, type hints, formatted with Black).
